title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Respiratory and Allergy Therapies (SAC-RAT) – Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Respiratory and Allergy Therapies (SAC-RAT) – Agenda
Date and Time: Friday, February 23, 2018 / 9am to 4pm Chairperson: Irvin Mayers Science Advisor: Conrad Pereira Scientific Regulatory Affairs Supervisors: Larissa Lefebvre and Carl Poulin Participants: SAC-RAT Members, Health Canada employees
9:00am - 9:05am Opening remarks Director General, J. Patrick Stewart, Therapeutic Products Directorate
9:05am - 9:20am Introductions, Affiliations and Interests declarations, Review of Agenda, Introduction of new member Chair and members
9:20am - 10:20am Presentation: Establishing Therapeutic Equivalence for Subsequent Market Entry orally inhaled products submitted as an Abbreviated New Drug Submission (ANDS) Bureau of Cardiology, Allergy and Neurological Sciences and Bureau of Pharmaceutical Sciences
10:20am - 11:20am Discussion SAC-RAT members
11:30am - 12:30pm Fingerprinting for members
12:30pm - 1:15pm Lunch
1:15pm - 2:45pm Discussion and Recommendation SAC-RAT members
2:45pm - 3:00pm Overview of Population Bioequivalence (PBE) Biostatistics, Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs
3:00pm - 3:30pm Presentation and Recommendation Data Requirements for Strengths of Orally Inhaled Drug Products not administered in In Vivo Studies Bureau of Pharmaceutical Sciences
3:30pm - 3:45pm Future direction of the committee and membership list Chair and members
3:45pm - 4:00pm Next steps, Closing Remarks and Adjournment of Meeting Chair
